pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you need more power.

free.name: Free
free.description: For casual users and quick lookups.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can cancel your Pro subscription at any time. You'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards through our secure payment processor (Stripe). Apple Pay and Google Pay are also supported.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All connections are encrypted with SSL. We never store Instagram passwords and only process publicly available data.

faqs.question: How much do Instagram analytics tools typically cost?
faqs.answer: Most range from free to $30/month. IGStoryPeek offers a free tier with 2 searches every 8 hours and a Pro plan at $29/month for unlimited access across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat.

faqs.question: What features do paid social media tools offer that free ones don't?
faqs.answer: Pro plans typically include unlimited searches, continuous tracking alerts, AI-powered insights, advanced filtering, and CSV exports — features that go beyond what free tiers provide.

faqs.question: Do social media analytics tools offer free trials?
faqs.answer: IGStoryPeek's free plan is permanently free with 2 searches every 8 hours. You can upgrade to Pro anytime and cancel whenever you like — no trial period needed.

faqs.question: Is it worth paying for Instagram analytics when free tools exist?
faqs.answer: Free tools are great for casual use. If you need unlimited searches, automated alerts, or professional-grade reports, a paid plan provides significantly more value and saves time.

about.title: About

userPrivacy.title: User Privacy

about.contactDesc: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

faqs.question: Is it legal to use social media analytics tools?
faqs.answer: Yes. IGStoryPeek only processes publicly available data and complies with applicable privacy regulations. We never access private profiles or restricted content.

faqs.question: Can I use IGStoryPeek for academic or market research?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many researchers and marketing professionals use IGStoryPeek to analyze public social media trends, engagement patterns, and content strategies.

faqs.question: Does IGStoryPeek sell user data?
faqs.answer: No. We do not sell, trade, or share any user data with third parties. Read our Privacy Policy for details.

faqs.question: How does IGStoryPeek collect data?
faqs.answer: We analyze publicly available data from social media platforms. No private data, DMs, or restricted content is ever accessed.

faqs.question: What platforms does IGStoryPeek support?
faqs.answer: Currently, IGStoryPeek supports Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat analytics.

homeFaqs.question: Can you view Instagram stories without an account?
homeFaqs.answer: Yes. IGStoryPeek lets you browse public Instagram stories without creating an account or logging in. Simply enter a public username and view their stories, highlights, and reels instantly.

homeFaqs.question: What is a social media analytics tool and how does it work?
homeFaqs.answer: A social media analytics tool collects and analyzes publicly available data from platforms like Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat. It presents metrics such as engagement rates, follower growth, and content performance in easy-to-read reports.

homeFaqs.question: Is it safe to use third-party Instagram story viewers?
homeFaqs.answer: Reputable tools like IGStoryPeek are safe because they only access publicly available data and never ask for your Instagram credentials. Always avoid services that request your password or require you to log in with your social media account.

homeFaqs.question: What social media platforms can you browse without creating an account?
homeFaqs.answer: With IGStoryPeek you can browse public content from Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat — all without creating an account on any of those platforms.

homeFaqs.question: Do story viewer tools work on private Instagram accounts?
homeFaqs.answer: No. IGStoryPeek and similar tools only access content from public profiles. Private accounts are not accessible, and any service that claims otherwise should not be trusted.

homeFaqs.question: What is the difference between social media analytics and social media monitoring?
homeFaqs.answer: Analytics focuses on measuring performance metrics like engagement rates and growth trends. Monitoring focuses on staying informed about real-time changes such as new posts, stories, or profile updates.
